title: Monanthotaxis kenyensis
taxonomy: Monanthotaxis kenyensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Annonaceae. It belongs to the genus Monanthotaxis, which is a group of flowering plants native to tropical Africa. The plant's classification is further defined as a member of the tribe Monanthotaxeae. Within the kingdom Plantae, Monanthotaxis kenyensis can be classified as follows: kingdom Plantae, clade Angiosperms, clade Magnoliids, class Magnoliopsida, order Magnoliales, family Annonaceae, genus Monanthotaxis, species M. kenyensis. Its specific classification reflects the evolutionary relationships between Monanthotaxis kenyensis and other flowering plants.
